raw_consumer_statement: We traveled to South Carolina in XXXX. During this trip we rented a XXXX passenger XXXX. When we showed up it was only a XXXX passenger so they messed up and had to upgrade me to a XXXX passenger as they didn't have any XXXX passenger. They were supposed to keep me at the same price at what was quoted. They ended up charing me almost XXXX dollars more and wouldn't come off of that. I have sent Citibank the files showing original quote and charged amount 4 times. They opened and closed the dispute without talking to me or asking for any other documents. They have refused to reopen it despite me asking them to do this several times by phone and email. I have told them I will close my account immediately if this doesn't get fixed. I want a real person to call me so walk through the documents I sent and them get a bona fide statement from me. They are pencil whipping this compliant and dispute without any regard for the customer. This is a common issue with Citibank. I want this escalated with the company
